title: BEM-842 diagnose marker
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:03 (UTC+3)'
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
lines=text.splitlines()
positions=[]
for i,line in enumerate(lines,start=1):
    if 'Queue processor execution marker' in line or 'mark_queue_processor_step_seen.sh' in line or 'Commit workflow dispatch queue results' in line or 'Process workflow dispatch queue' in line or 'Complete job' in line or 'git add' in line:
        positions.append({'line':i,'text':line.strip()})
ctx=[]
for p in positions:
    if 'Queue processor execution marker' in p['text']:
        start=max(1,p['line']-8); end=min(len(lines),p['line']+14)
        ctx=['%s: %s'%(n,lines[n-1]) for n in range(start,end+1)]
marker_exists=Path('governance/state/queue_processor_step_seen.json').exists()
result_marker_exists=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/queue_processor_step_seen.status.json').exists()
script_exists=Path('scripts/mark_queue_processor_step_seen.sh').exists()
status='marker_step_present_but_not_committed' if ('Queue processor execution marker' in text and script_exists and not marker_exists and not result_marker_exists) else 'marker_diagnosed'
next_action='move marker before main commit step or add marker paths to final commit stage so files are persisted'
state={'bem':'BEM-842','status':status,'marker_step_present':'Queue processor execution marker' in text,'script_exists':script_exists,'marker_exists':marker_exists,'result_marker_exists':result_marker_exists,'positions':positions[-50:],'marker_context':ctx,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem842_diagnose_marker_step_not_committed.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem842_diagnose_marker_step_not_committed.md').write_text('# BEM-842 | Diagnose Marker Step Not Committed | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-842'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem842_diagnose_marker_step_not_committed.json','governance/reports/bem842_diagnose_marker_step_not_committed.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem842_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Diagnosed why the queue processor execution marker did not appear after BEM-841 tick')
"""
